title: Zoth - Rekt
relevance_summary: Admin privileges exploited leading to contract swap and fund drain

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades a contract with admin privileges and immediately transfers funds.

red_flags: Contract upgrade followed by immediate funds transfer
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades a contract with admin privileges and immediately transfers funds.
summary: Zoth lost $8.4 million when their contract was compromised and upgraded to drain funds. An on-chain guard could have blocked the transaction by detecting a contract upgrade followed by an immediate funds transfer.
